name: biomcp
title: BioMCP — 50+ Biomedical Databases, One Command
description: Production-grade read-only biomedical MCP server unifying PubMed, ClinicalTrials.gov, ClinVar, gnomAD, OncoKB, Reactome, KEGG, UniProt, PharmGKB, CPIC, OpenFDA, Monarch Initiative, GWAS Catalog, and 40+ other sources into a single consistent command grammar. Covers genes, variants, diseases, drugs, trials, articles, phenotypes, pathways, proteins, diagnostics, and adverse events. One command per entity type — no learning curve.
